finding_results.notes: Lena now sizes Noor up as unarmed before speaking. Noor only takes the broken shelving after Lena turns away, and the scrape on the tile is the explicit cue that makes Lena turn back.
The terminal beat keeps the ordinary chime and Noor's silent read, but the message is restored to the sprint-thanks/productive closing beat required by the chapter context.
The repeated watch description is removed. The watch remains only as an already-known object Jae-won keeps checking.
The recycled summary of Lena's territorial control is cut. Her control now stays implicit through Noor's expectation that Lena appears upstairs only on her own terms.
